title:
Perishable food waste in New Zealand retail supermarkets
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Perishable food waste in New Zealand retail supermarkets
I am planning to research reducing perishable food waste in retail supermarkets in New Zealand using a machine learning approach. For this purpose, I intend to utilise secondary data on perishable food waste from supermarkets. I need data in Excel format.
High wastages of perishable food from supermarkets in New Zealand.
Developing a machine learning model to minimise the wastage from supermarkets.

### Response from Statistics New Zealand
Status Data not available for release
Comments Stats NZ does not hold this type of data. I suggest trying an alternative source such as:
https://lovefoodhatewaste.co.nz/food-waste/resources/research/

#### Likely Source Agency
Statistics New Zealand
1
								
									Subscriber
